headline: Fastenal (FAST) Plans New Georgia Distribution Center
summary: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) is one of the 15 Set-It-and-Forget-It Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 13, 2026, Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) officially announced that it will begin construction of a new Southeast U.S. regional distribution and logistics center in Carrollton, Georgia. The facility is scheduled to open in spring 2027 and is anticipated to significantly […]
